scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present day. Dragging an unconscious adult with them a group of Lost Boys runs through the undergrowth. Arriving at a wooden cage they lock their prisoner up. Briefly, the camera focuses on the prisoner revealing him to be Neal Cassidy.

dialog.dialog: You heard Pan. You know what to do with him.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present day. Pan’s camp. Lost Boys play chanting. Henry Mills watches them from a distance. One Lost Boy, Devin, approaches Henry nudging him with a stick.

dialog.dialog: So, you're the kid Pan's been looking for all this time.
Ask him.  Stop it!
If you can't take this, how are you gonna handle what Pan has in store for you?
Not bad. But wouldn't it be more fun, if you had real swords?
I’ve never used a real sword.

This is Neverland and you have the heart of the truest believer. You can use whatever you want.  You just need to believe, Henry. Close your eyes and believe you're holding a real sword.  What are you waiting for? Go on.  Go on! Go for it! Keep going! Come on!  Come on, Henry!
I'm sorry. It was an accident.
Henry. Don't you know the best thing about being a Lost Boy?  You never apologize.  Come on.
Yeah.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present day. Neal Cassidy’s hideout. David Nolan lights a torch. There are chalk markings on the wall. Emma Swan struggles to remove pillows in order to examine the markings more closely. Hook watches Emma.

dialog.dialog: You need a hand, love?
Is that a joke?
No, I'm being quite serious.
Wow.
What is it?
It appears Neal marked his days trapped on this island.
What's wrong?
Look here. Neal stopped counting.
Cause he got off the island?
He was here longer.
Then, why would he...
Because he lost hope.
You got that from scribbles?
I got that because it's what I did. Every time I went to a new foster home. I counted days until counting seemed pointless.
You think the same thing is happening to Henry?
Pan said it would.
Hey, we’re gonna rescue him.
Yeah, I know that. And you know that, but Henry doesn't know that. Pan wants him to lose faith.
So, what? You want to send him a message? Because I haven't seen a Neverland post office. What are you suggesting?
We take a page from Pan. And we start being clever. We need to send a simple sign. A sign that we’re coming.
With Lost Boys running around trying to kill us all?
Maybe it's time we use that to our advantage.
How?
Follow me, I'll show you.
Swan?
What? We’re wasting time.
I... I just wanted to let you know that I do know what it feels like. To lose hope.
I know what this is. This... you...you know, trying to bond with me. So, save your breath. I'm not in the mood.
Let me give you a bit of advice, Hook. She's never gonna like you.
Is that so?
How could she? You're nothing but a pirate.

scenes.sceneDesc: Enchanted Forest. Past. The Jewel of the Realm is at anchor. Sailors attend to their assigned tasks.

dialog.dialog: Look alive, men!
Take the sail, take the rig!
All hands on deck!
All hands on deck!
Apologies, lieutenant.

It's Lieutenant Jones, sailor. The captain is in transit with new orders from the king himself. Before his arrival this ship will be swapped from stem to stern and...  Rum, sailor?  Does anyone know what happens to sailors, who drink rum?  They get drunk. And drunkenness leads to bad form. And if there's one thing that won't be tolerated aboard this ship, it's bad form.
My ship has never been in finer hands.
Aye, Captain. We stand ready to receive the king's orders.
To your stations. When the king summoned me, I knew there was only one man I could trust, to navigate this difficult journey. My little brother.
Perhaps you mean younger brother.
A gift. To commemorate our latest voyage together.
A sextant? You always were the sentimental type.
Look closer, brother.
I’ve never seen markings like this. To what strange land are we headed?
I'm under orders not to say until we arrived. But, brother, this is the mission of our dreams. A mission that will bring peace to the kingdom and glory to the Jones brothers.
A hero's journey. That's indeed good form, brother.  Master bosun?
Aye, sir?
All hands prepare to set sail. Make speed.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present day. Emma and Mary Margaret, Regina make ropes.

dialog.dialog: A trap? That's your plan?
The Lost Boys wanna come after us, we need to go after them.
You really think, the Lost Boys are gonna betray Pan?
Thanks for the advice. David?
Yeah?
We need more vines.
On it. You're coming with me, pirate.
Why's that?
Because, we need more rope.
If the lady insists.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present day. David picks up vines. Hook follows close behind.

dialog.dialog: What would you like to yell at me about now, Dave?
Stay away from my daughter.
I guess, she can take care of herself. She doesn't need your parenting. Which is a good thing.
What does that mean?
It means you're gonna die in a day or so, anyway.
Nothing I can do about that. But, if I do die,...
When...
It'll be in helping my family and that something someone like you can't understand.
What, if I told you there's a way to save you?
I'd say no, cause anything that takes us off course of saving Henry, is selfish. But, of course, you would think that was the way to go.
Bugger off. You think, I'm being selfish? I'm risking my life for all of you, every moment I'm here aligned against him.
Please, you're not here out of any nobility. You're here for Emma. And let me tell you something else: You're never gonna get her. I'll see to that.
It's a good thing you're gonna die then. Mate. Mate, stop. I don't fight invalids.  Mate? Mate?

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present day. Hook pours rum into David’s mouth. Coughing David awakes.

dialog.dialog: Have another drink.
No, thank you. I'm okay now.
No, you're not. I thought you had days left. Let me see. Let me see that.
No.
Let me see.  The Dreamshade has almost reached your heart. It's hours now. You have to tell your family.
No. Not, when I can still help them save Henry.
Catch your breath, mate, or the little time you have, will be less.  What's that?
It's a military insignia.  "Jones". You know him?

Aye, he was my captain. And my brother. We voyaged this infernal island a long time ago. This was on the strap of his satchel my brother lost during a duel with Pan. It must have washed down with the rains from the storms that wrecked the Jolly Roger.
From where?
There. Dead Man's Peak. I thought it was gone forever.
What was gone?
No, it's too dangerous.
What's too dangerous? If you know something that can help us, don't hold back.

If this insignia survived all this years, then perhaps my brother's satchel did as well. And inside this satchel is a sextant, that can help us to decode Neal's star map that can get us off this island.
I know now, how I'm gonna spend my last hours, we’re gonna find that thing.
Well, look, you might reach the top, but you'll die before you return.
Then, come with me and make sure the sextant gets back to Emma. You ready to be a hero?

scenes.sceneDesc: Enchanted Forest. Past. Liam and Killian are aboard the Jewel of the Realm.

dialog.dialog: Relay the order!
Aye, sir
Star charts. I've never seen these constellations before.
No one has.
That's right. We're going to a new land, brother.
Enemy sighted off the port quarter!
A frigate and two corvettes gaining fast. Master gunner, roll out the port cannons! Stand by to bring her about
Belay that order!  That was close.
We'll never outrun them.
Have faith, leftenant. Deploy the Pegasus!
Deploy the Pegasus!
Heave! Ho! Heave! Ho! Heave! Ho!
What is that?
Let's go!
That is a sail woven from the last remaining feathers of the great creature, Pegasus.
Legend has it that horse could fly.
Indeed. So can we. Hang on!  Whoo-hoo!  Set a course, leftenant. Second star to the right, and strait on 'till morning.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present day. Hook and David return to the camp to tell the others about the sextant.

dialog.dialog: A sextant? And you're telling us about this now?
How do we know you're not lying?
Oh, you don't, but I'm not. It's the best hope yet we've had of an exit plan, and don't forget we're going to need one.
Then what are we waiting for?
Emma... you were right. We need to get that message to Henry. Every day without hope is a day closer to becoming a lost boy.  Your father and I should go.
Hook's right.
Uh, you wanna split up?
It's the last thing I wanna do, but there's a chance he can get us home.
Okay
And, Emma, while I'm gone just...
Listen to my mother?
Be careful.
Always am.
And when you send that message to Henry, add something to it for me, would ya?
Mm-hmm
Tell him... tell him grandpa loves him.
Oh. Uh, ok. Good luck.
Yeah. You, too.
You all right?
Yeah  I just-- I've gotta go.
Mmm. I'll see you soon.
Well, you know Neverland's a dangerous place, and... you know-- you just never know what's gonna happen.
David. You're gonna be fine.
Right.
Mmm.
I love you.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present day. Emma, Mary Margaret, and Regina getting ready to entrap Devin. Mary Margaret draws her bow as Devin hunts a pig. She fires the arrow into a rope, releasing a net, which falls on top of him.

dialog.dialog: Uhh!  What are you doing?!  Are you trying to start a war with Pan.
Pan started the war when he kidnapped my son.
But that doesn't you our enemy.
What's that?
Chocolate. I thought you might like the taste of something sweet.
We don't wanna hurt you. We just need you to deliver a message to Henry.
Why should I help you?
Because you had a home and a family once and you stopped believing you could get back to them. Now we're here. We can help-- not just Henry, all of you. We can get you home.
Mmm.  Don't you get it? I'm here because I don't wanna go home. None of us do.
Pan's a monster. Look what he did to you.
Oh, Pan didn't do that. Henry did.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present day. David and Hook are navigating their way through the jungle.

dialog.dialog: How are you holding up, mate?
Don't worry about me. Just worry about getting us to the sextant.
I meant the good-byes. Looked a bit stormy back there.
I did what had to be done, and I did it out of love. Emma and Mary Margaret will understand that.
You gonna tell them that from beyond the grave.
No. You are. You're gonna tell them that I died a hero, fighting for their way home. What you're not gonna tell them is that I left already a dead man.
The truth, you mean.
Their last memories of me won't me of a liar.
Why should I help you?
Well, if you didn't steal that bean, they wouldn't have had a chance to take Henry, we wouldn't be on this island, and I wouldn't be dying of dreamshade.
Fair point. At least you got to say good-bye. Most people don't get that much.
You lost someone, didn't you?
This is where we ascend. I'll climb ahead and throw down the rope.
He was your brother, right? I had a brother, too, you know. A twin. He died before I ever met him.
There were two of you? I can barely stomach one.
Ah, you would've liked him. He was a thief and a liar.
Yeah, you would've liked my brother. He could be a stubborn ass. Now wait here.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Past. Killian and Liam set foot onto the shore of Neverland. Liam picks up an envelope from their rowboat.

dialog.dialog: What exactly does the king have to find on this island?
A plant.
We journeyed across the realms for a plant?
Our sources say it's magical. Potent enough to heal any injury.
So we never have to bury another sailor at sea again?
Now you understand the importance of our mission.
Are you two lost?  You look lost to me.
Identify yourself, boy.
I'm Peter Pan. I live here. Who are you?
Captain Jones.  And my leftenant.  We're here by order of the king.
The king, huh? We don't have any kings in Neverland. Just me.
That's funny. We seek this plant.  Now tell us, boy, where can we find it?
Your king sent you for this plant?
You know it?
Dreamshade? It's the deadliest plant on the island. Your king is really ruthless.
Nonsense
It's medicine.
It's doom. Why fight a messy battle when you can kill an entire army with the sap of one plant?
Is it possible? The kind would turn poison upon our enemies.
Don't be so gullible.  This boy is playing games, and I'm quickly tiring of them.  Come. We should keep moving.
Don't say I didn't warn you.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present. Dead Man's Peak. Hook pulls vines from a dead tree. David waves from the base as Hook is about to throw the vines down, but Peter Pan appears in the distance out of nowhere.

dialog.dialog: Don't pull him up yet.  I wanna talk. Alone.
What do you want?
To offer you a deal. Come back and work for me, like the old days.
I don't miss the old days.
What if I were to offer you something hard to come by.  Passage off the island.
Still not interested.
What if I were to sweeten the deal? You can take someone with you... Emma.
Emma would never leave her son.

She did once before, and you can be there to pick up the pieces. We've known each other a very long time, Killian. We've done business before and I think this is the perfect time to restart that relationship.
What if I'm not interested.
Of course you are. Because that's what I've always liked about you. You're good at surviving.
What do you want me to do?
Be in my employ. Do my dirty work.
What dirty work?
When the time comes, I'll let you know. But first, I need a signal that you've taken my deal.
So my word right now wouldn't be good enough?
You know me.  I like action. I'll know you've taken my deal when I see the prince's dead body up on that peak.
Oh, you'll see that anyway. He's on his last legs thanks to dreamshade.
I wanna see you kill him before the poison. I want to see your hook inside his body.
And what if I don't take your offer.
Remember the last time you didn't listen to me.  Have a drink. You know it always helps you think.
Bloody hell. I told you to wait.
Were you talking to someone?
Just talking to myself. It's an old habit from many nights on the lonely seas.
Well, I'm glad to see your enjoying the refreshments while you do it.
Apologies, mate. It isn't much farther now.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Past. Dead Man's Peak. Liam and Killian walk towards a dreamshade plant, and Liam compares it to the one in his drawing.

dialog.dialog: Well, it certainly doesn't look like medicine.
You choose to believe that boy over our king?
That boy showed us the path to the dreamshade. Why would he lie about its nature.
To keep it all for himself. You actually think our king would send us to retrieve something so dangerous.
I would hope not. This is not what I signed up for.
You signed up to listen to your king.
Because I thought he was a--a man of honour.
He is!
If this is a poison it won't just end the war. It will obliterate an entire race.
What do you know of any of this? I am your brother and your captain. You will listen to me.
No. I'll fight my enemies, but I'll fight fair.
Then allow me to disabuse you of that illusion.
Brother, don't!
See? Perfectly fine. I told you; Our king would never lie to us. Now let's collect our specimens and get off this--
Liam?
Killian...
Your arm!
I'm sorry, brother.
No... No. No!

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present. Emma, Regina, and Mary Margaret have a Devin tied to a tree. Emma is in his face, interrogating him.

dialog.dialog: It's too late! Henry is a Lost Boy, now! Your boy is one of the most vicious recruits we've had in ages!
Don't let him get to you, okay?
Move aside.
Why?
So I can rip his heart out! Then he'll do exactly what we want.
This is not how we do things! Emma, we can find another way.
Really? And what do you think, Emma?
I think we need to talk to our son.
We can't do this! That is brutal--
We can't but she can. Do it Regina!
Emma!
I'm sorry.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present. Emma is sitting, her and Mary Margaret dealing with the aftermath of the previous scene.

dialog.dialog: Mary Margaret, I'm sorry.
You don't have to apologize to me. It's Henry I'm worried about.
I know. That's why I'm willing to let Regina do whatever it takes.
When we get to him, I just want to make sure the line is still there.
What line?
The line between what Regina is willing to do, and what you are willing to do.
I'm willing to do whatever it takes to get him home!
But the cost can't be this family.
It won't be.
Second thoughts?
Let's get him that message.
Oh, we're going to do more than that.  We're gonna see him.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present. Dead Man's Peak. Hook and David approach the dreamshade vines.

dialog.dialog: Well, since you're already dying from the stuff, you won't mind if I stand back while you..?
Yeah.  I know about your deal with Pan.
You heard that, then?
Yeah. I heard that.
Then you know I didn't agree.
Yeah, you also didn't disagree.
Don't you see? This is what he wanted, to turn us against each other.
Well, it worked.
You're making the poison spread quicker, mate.
I don't care. I just have to last long enough to get the sextant back to my family. Now take me to it!
My brother didn't lose his satchel up here! I made that up.
What about the insignia?
I dropped it on the path so you'd find it.
Why?
Because I knew you'd never make the journey here if I told you the truth.
The truth? The truth--you brought me here to die?
I brought you here to save your life!
You're a liar!

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Past. Dead Man's Peak. Killian is hovering over Liam's unconscious body.

dialog.dialog: Come on. Liam!  Hey, hey. Let's get you back to the ship, come on. Killian tries to pick his brother off of the ground. Pan appears behind them.)
I tried to warn you. He'll die as soon as the poison reaches his heart.
Please. He's my brother. He's all I have left.
Well, maybe you shouldn't have goaded him into it.
He's so stubborn. I didn't mean to. Can you help me?
Well, I might not feel like it, but today's your lucky day. There is a way to stop him from dying.
Tell me.
This spring. These waters are rich with the power of Neverland. It's what keeps this land and all on it so... young. If one was to drink directly from it, its powers could cure any ill.
Thank you.
But... I must warn you. All magic comes with a price, and that spring is no exception. Don't leave the island unless you're willing to pay it.
Of course, whatever you want. It's yours.  Brother!
That's captain to you.  What happened?
It doesn't matter. Now let's pay the boy.
How?
Boy! What do you want?  Boy?

scenes.sceneDesc: Present. Neverland. Pan's camp. Henry is sitting on the outskirts and draws a picture of a house in the dirt. Devin approaches him.

dialog.dialog: I don't want to fight again, okay?
I didn't come to fight. I came to deliver a message.  Your family is here.
What?
They're on the island...
...trying to find you.
Y--you--you're making this up because I cut your cheek. You're trying to get back at me.
I'm not making it up.
Look.
Henry, are you okay?
Henry! Can you hear me?
Mom?
I'm here too, Henry!
No.  This is a trick.
No. No, this is not a trick. Henry, I promise you this is real. Kid, it's Operation Cobra Rescue. It's us.
Y--you're here?
Yes. We're coming to get you.
There's someone coming.  It's Pan. I--I--I gotta go.
Henry--
I--I gotta go.
We love you!

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Flying over Neverland in the Jewel Of The Realm. Killian and Liam are in the Captain's Quarters of the ship.

dialog.dialog: How are you feeling?
Shipshape.  Killian... I should have listened to you.
Oh.  I'm just glad you survived. What now, brother?
We reveal our King's cowardice.
Well, let's hope the realm sides with us.
Oh, they will.  To fight battles with unholy weapons is, as you say, bad form.
Aye,  I will follow you to the ends of the earth, brother.
off-stage All hands, brace for landing!  Land ho!
What do you say, Liam?  You want some company when you report to the Admiralty?  Liam?
No. No!  Liam!  Liam. Liam!  No, no, no, no! No, no, no!  Help! Help! Liam...

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present. Dead Man's Peak. David is unconscious on the ground. Hook takes his canteen.

dialog.dialog: Bloody hell.  Mate, wake up.
Hey! Get off me!
Hey, whoa, whoa!  Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa! Whoa, whoa. Look.  In this canteen is the water that will stop the dreamshade and will save your life.
That's why you brought me up here?
Yes.
You knew I wouldn't come on my own; that I wouldn't leave my family.
That you were stubborn? Yes, I gathered that rather quickly.
Well, give it to me.
There's something you need to know first. Because its power comes from the island, once you drink this water, you can never leave Neverland.

It's a small price to pay for what I get in return--the chance to save my grandson...  and to help my family get home.  One question. Why risk your life for me when there wasn't anything for you in return?
I didn't do it for you, mate.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present. Dead Man's Peak. David is unconscious on the ground. Hook takes his canteen.

dialog.dialog: You think he's okay?
He's fine.
You know this how?
Because he's our son, and he's a survivor, and now he has something to survive for. He knows we're coming, and we're not gonna let him down.
I'm sorry I doubted you. I'm just...  I know how easy it is to give in to the darkness. I didn't want you to--
She didn't. I did. That's what I'm here for. One happy family.
Stand down, it's us!
Uh, Where is the sextant?
I'm afraid Pan got to it first.
I'm not complaining but what was that--
Okay, I'm.. complaining.
What I wouldn't give for another sleeping curse.
Hook... He saved my life.
You sure you want to tell them that, mate?

On our trek, we were ambushed by Lost Boys. Pinned down, outnumbered. But Hook, he risked his life to stop me from getting hit by a poisoned arrow but if it wasn't for Hook, I wouldn't be alive.  Your flask, please.  I thought he deserved a little credit.
Thank you.
To Hook.
I don't do rum.
To Hook.  Did you really save his life?
That surprise you?
Well, you and David aren't exactly...  How do you say it?  Mates?
Doesn't mean I'd leave your father to perish on this island.
Thank you.
Um...  Perhaps gratitude is in order now.
Uh, yeah. That's what the "Thank you" was for.
Mm. That all your father's life is worth to you?
Please.  You couldn't handle it.
Perhaps it's you who couldn't handle it.  That was, um...
A one-time thing. Don't follow me. Wait five minutes. Go get some firewood or something.
As you wish.

scenes.sceneDesc: Open Ocean. Past. Aboard the Jewel of the Realm. The crew stages a burial at sea for their Late captain Liam Jones.

dialog.dialog: This belongs to you now,  Captain.

You will never leave my side, Brother...  We are sworn... to serve the King and this realm.  They sent us to retrieve an unthinkable poison, one that killed our dear Captain.  Never again shall anyone sail to that cursed land.  And never again shall we take such orders!
Yes! Here, Here!
Serving the King; Fighting his wars!
No!
That is the way of dishonor! And all you who disagree, flee now or walk the bloody plank! For those who stay will be free men, and I will be your Captain.
Aye!
We'll sail under the crimson flag and we'll give our enemies no quarter. We'll take what we please!
Yes!
And we'll live by our own rules...  for that is the best form of all!
Yeah!
Our kingdom is corrupt and immoral. They took my brother from me, and now I'm gonna take everything they've got...
Yes!
Starting with this ship.  Bring the paint from below!
Sir?
It's time we rename this vessel. We no longer sail as the "Jewel of the Realm". We now sail as the "Jolly Roger"!
Yes! Yeah!
and when they come for us, I want them to know exactly what we are-- Pirates!  For at least among thieves, there is honor!
Long live Captain Jones!
Captain Jones! Captain Jones! Captain Jones! Captain Jones! Captain Jones! Captain Jones! Captain Jones! Captain Jones! Captain Jones!

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present. Hook is sitting alone in the woods.

dialog.dialog: You really should have taken my deal.
It looks like I don't need your help with Emma after all, mate.
What, you think that kiss actually meant something?
I do. I think it means she's finally starting to see me for the man I am.
What?  That you're a one-handed Pirate with a drinking problem? I'm no grown-up, but I'm pretty sure that's less than appealing.
A man of honor.
So tell me, what would a "man of honor" such as yourself do with a big, fat secret?
Um... well that depends what the secret is.
Baelfire.  Neal.  Whatever name he goes by these days. The guy Emma loves. Henry's father.
What of him? He's dead.
No. I'm afraid not.  He's alive. That's not even the best part.  He's in Neverland.
Is he?

Oh, yes. Can you believe it? I'm sure that Emma would love to know that Henry's father is still alive. But I'd hate for that to get in the way of a  "budding romance". So, I'll leave it up to you to tell her or not.  Let's see what kind of man you really are. .

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present. Hook is sitting alone in the woods.

dialog.dialog: How's our guest?
We drugged him. He'll be asleep for a while. Where do you want him?
Hang him up. Over there. Next to the other one.

scenes.sceneDesc: Neverland. Present. Hook is sitting alone in the woods.
